title: Humble Pixelmon
description: Boarding on the ultimate Pixelmon adventure, providing the best possible experience and performance in the Pixelmon world.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AEQGK6kv/images/f5edc9209e31af5f18af1948cf04daf78919045c.png)

**Welcome to Humble Pixelmon.** We offer a unique experience where you can have hours of fun playing the real Pixelmon, capturing the true essence of the game. 

## Our modpack was specifically designed for:
Those with low-spec computers, ensuring that everyone can embark on this exciting journey without hardware limitations.

## Say farewell to lag and slowdowns:
- Our modpack incorporates essential performance mods such as Embeddium and Starlight to guarantee a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay experience. 
- You can even enhance your world by installing shaders to experience stunning visuals and fully immerse yourself in the Pixelmon universe like never before.

Before downloading, you should know that our modpack focuses on optimizing your adventure while staying true to the core Pixelmon gameplay. We offer an improved experience with a more rewarding progression system, ensuring that every achievement in our world feels like a significant milestone in your journey.

> Playing Pixelmon can be humble.
